title: Mulanje Mountain Huts Booking: A Guide to All 10 Huts
meta_title: Mulanje Mountain Huts Booking: All 10 Huts Guide
meta_description: Complete mulanje mountain huts booking guide — capacity, fees, facilities & how to reserve all 10 huts via MMCT. Plan your Mount Mulanje trek from Thyolo.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Mount Mulanje has 10 overnight huts scattered across its plateaus and valleys, each with its own character. Here's everything you need to know about booking them — capacity, fees, facilities, and how to reserve through MMCT and InfoMulanje.
content:
Blog post created and image generated. Here's a summary:

**File:** `src/content/blog/mulanje-mountain-huts-booking-guide.json`

**What's included:**
- ~2,000 words of SEO-optimized HTML content
- Target keyword "mulanje mountain huts booking" used in the first paragraph + 3 more times naturally
- **11 H2/H3 sections** covering all 10 huts individually, the booking process, fees, packing list, and where to stay
- **5 images** at natural break points (forest-view, garden-walkway, main-house, pool-area, outdoor-dining)
- **3 internal links:** `/blog/sapitwa-peak-climbing-guide`, `/blog/mulanje-grand-traverse-guide`, `/blog/where-to-stay-after-likabula-falls`
- The Thyolo House mentioned 4 times naturally as a pre/post-trek base
- WhatsApp CTA + email near the end
- Complete fee table with MK and USD equivalents
- Practical tips: packing checklist, guide recommendations, watchman tipping etiquette
- Blog header image generated at `public/images/blog/mulanje-mountain-huts-booking-guide.jpg`
